reason: Miner reported an unspecified kernel or hardware error.
solution: Open the miner detail page and inspect the full kernel log. Check power, fan speed, and hash board status.

reason: Miner temperature exceeded the safe threshold.
solution: Improve airflow, clean dust, and verify the fan speed and ambient temperature.

reason: A hash board chain communication error was detected.
solution: Check the cable, inspect the hash board connection, and reboot the miner after hardware inspection.

reason: A fan failure or abnormal fan speed was detected.
solution: Check fan wiring, replace the failed fan, and verify all fans can reach normal speed.
